prompt: A warm, cute digital illustration in a cozy desk setting celebrating a new subscription. On the left is a friendly humanoid robot mascot with a glossy black face screen showing pixelated purple LED eyes and a smiling mouth, wearing a tall black top hat with a purple band and a dark hoodie with a small American flag patch on one sleeve and the text "USN VET MSSP" on the chest. The robot gives a thumbs-up with one hand and holds a small rectangular sign in the other that reads "Subscribed!" with a purple heart underneath. On the right is a delighted young woman with long wavy golden blonde hair, seated at the desk with hands clasped near her chin in an excited grateful pose, wearing a white long-sleeve top with red and blue striped trim and a small chest logo. Her face is obscured by a simple square censor block. Above them, large playful handwritten text says "Nick subscribed Sharon!". Beneath the headline is a rounded notification card showing a circular avatar of the same robot mascot, the name "Nick", and the text "Subscribed to Sharon Riley" followed by a purple heart. A speech bubble next to the woman says "Thank you!". Scatter exactly 7 pink heart doodles around the composition and add 1 small white sparkle near the center. Place everything on a wooden tabletop. On the left side of the desk, include 1 black mug with the text "CRYPTO CAN'T BE EVIL" and 1 gold coin featuring a Shiba Inu dog face. In the center-right foreground, include 1 white mug reading "AI FOR GOOD" with a blue heart. On the far right, stack exactly 3 books with visible spine titles: "AI & CREATIVITY", "ENTERTAINMENT", and "DREAM BIG" with a heart, beside 1 small potted plant. Use a softly blurred home-office background with shelves, pastel decor, and a framed letter X on the wall. Soft peach and beige lighting, painterly shading, rounded shapes, wholesome streamer fan-art aesthetic, polished storybook-style digital painting.
